productDisplayName: Highlander Men Red Checked Hagley Slim Fit Shirt

The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up to give a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
